title: Lino Coria Mendoza Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Lino Coria Mendoza Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Lino Coria Mendoza
Khoury Faculty
PhD in Computer Science, University of British Columbia
Career Changer
After ten years of working in Vancouver’s tech industry, Lino Coria Mendoza realized his heart was set on academia. Now a professor at Khoury College’s Vancouver campus, he wants to make up for lost time by helping students reach their maximum potential.
It’s not so much that I’m here to teach, but I am here to help my students learn. And that learning means getting out of your comfort zone
Lino Coria Mendoza, Associate Teaching Professor
Explore all Khoury Stories
